target: Captains Fish and Chicken, 1616 1st Ave NE, Cedar Rapids, IA 52402
method: 5-agent parallel probe-guided sweep; fresh, no prior-build reliance

same store UUID as Uber Eats

only a topical discover page, no owned handle

2 relevant articles; both HTTP 429 rate-limited, facts via snippets matching KHAK

Wings, party wings, boneless bites, leg/thigh, tenders, shrimp, gizzards, livers, catfish/perch/tilapia/cod/red snapper, crab cakes, calamari, family fish deals, sides (fries, okra, hush puppies, mac&cheese bites, cheese curds, onion rings), kids meals, desserts, drinks, combo dinners

findings.caveat: AGGREGATOR-SOURCED, not owner-confirmed; Yelp menu page not address-stamped; 2 location menu variants differ slightly. Per truthfulness floor these are unverifiedClaims until owner confirms.
Live Google not directly readable; aggregator-attributed

findings.value: curbside pickup, delivery, takeaway, dine-in, NFC/mobile payments, wheelchair-accessible, free parking
findings.caveat: Property/attribute claims — NOT owner-confirmed service copy; dine-in etc. need owner confirmation before use

findings.value: 'Everything is made fresh to order'; calls ahead recommended

findings.value: DoorDash, Uber Eats, Grubhub, Seamless, Postmates all list the 1616 location

discrepancies.resolution: owner must confirm exact weekly hours
owner picks primary positioning + display category
owner confirms current 1616 menu + prices, or menu ships without prices
EXCLUDE 3100 6th St SW from this single-location build; record as scoping decision

ownerResidueQuestions: Domain: does the business own a web domain, or should we register one? (none currently exists — required to build)
Business email for the site / contact?
Analytics: do you have a Google Analytics 4 measurement ID (G-XXXX) and/or Google Ads?
Menu + prices: confirm the current 1616 menu and prices are the aggregator-captured list, or provide the real current menu/prices?
Exact weekly hours — confirm Sun 11-8, Mon-Thu 11-10, Fri-Sat 11-11?
Contact/lead form: want one on the site? If yes, is there an external form endpoint (e.g. Web3Forms)? Preferred contact channel (call/text/email)?
Text/SMS: is (319) 221-1040 textable, or is there a separate SMS number, or call-only?
Service model: dine-in seating? curbside? catering/party pans? which to feature?
3 value props to lead with (what makes Captains stand out)?
Any current promotion/offer to feature? (else omitted)
Trust facts: certifications, awards, guarantees, years-in-business framing? (need >=6 genuine or trust grid omitted)
Brand assets: logo, brand colors, and real food/storefront photos available?
Payment policy: cards / mobile pay accepted? (confirm)
OK to cite Google rating 4.4 / 208 reviews on the site?
